meaning: n.[兽医](牛、猫的)鼻气管炎(一种呼吸道传染病)
examples: Viral bovine rhinotracheitis simulates and may be combined with shipping fever.
Infectious bovine rhinotracheitis, which are caused by the bovine herpes virus type I, are extremely harmful to cattle industry.
Feline viral rhinotracheitis is caused by feline herpes virus. range of disease includes rhinitis, tracheitis, laryngitis and conjunctivitis. vaccinate every year for prevention.
